name: Impulsora del Desarrollo y el Empleo en America Latina, S.A.B. de C.V.
summary: Impulsora del Desarrollo y el Empleo en Am√É¬©rica Latina, S.A.B. de C.V., through its subsidiaries, engages in the infrastructure and engineering businesses in Mexico. It is involved in the construction, operation, and maintenance of road concessions; operation of wastewater treatment plants, multimodal terminals for passenger transport, and hydroelectric power plants; and provision of electronic toll services. The company also leases medical equipment for hospitals and equipment for universities; develops prison infrastructure; and offers electronic parking payment system services. Impulsora del Desarrollo y el Empleo en Am√É¬©rica Latina, S.A.B. de C.V. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Mexico City, Mexico.
